programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden 'triangles' - mysterious regions where ships, planes, and people enter and then just disappear. They are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere. But why?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: With just three days left in the season, a cold front sends gators into hiding. Willie and Little Willie split up for the first time ever to cover more ground, and Little Willie feels the pressure.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Human bones as a 'miracle cure' for gout? Living mummies buried alive? A truly bizarre Victorian way to lose weight—with tapeworms? The stranger side of human nature is revealed in these rituals.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: New ground-penetrating radar uncovers evidence of more structures in the swamp, and as winter approaches, the team puts a daring plan together to get into the Solution Channel for the first time.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: One of China's oldest provinces with history that reaches back over 4,000 years. Anthony explores hanging coffins, wineries, and a bomb shelter.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Human bones as a 'miracle cure' for gout? Living mummies buried alive? A truly bizarre Victorian way to lose weight—with tapeworms? The stranger side of human nature is revealed in these rituals.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: With just three days left in the season, a cold front sends gators into hiding. Willie and Little Willie split up for the first time ever to cover more ground, and Little Willie feels the pressure.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried. Whether it’s illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol—the truth always resurfaces.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: As the tumultuous first week nears its end, the remaining survivalists focus on regaining their footing. One participant discovers unconventional food sources to adapt to the harsh environment.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Two previous champions will face off in a gruelling five-hour challenge, making a blade inspired by Hollywood for the chance to duke it out against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake mix.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: When the team experiences a frustrating setback, they are stunned to learn it may have led to a breakthrough discovery.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: While the team struggles to stop water from pouring into the Garden Shaft, the connection between Oak Island, Captain Phipps and The Knights Templar is rapidly intensifying on Lot 5.

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural “Bloody Parrot”. Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: No One Like Me
programme.desc: Yang Qian Huan, the third disciple of the Imperial Astronomer, was once a golden boy. However, since the birth of Xu Qi An, his glory has waned. His relentless pursuit cannot defy a merciless truth: all has been foretold. Yet rising from his downfall, Yang defiantly forges his own path, refusing to bow to fate.

programme.title: Shaolin Abbot
programme.desc: Monk Chi San is sent by his Shaolin Master to learn a special kung fu skill from a Wu Dang priest. He gets embroiled in a fight between the Qing and Ming camps along the way, and has to gather disciples to rebuild the burnt Shaolin temple at the same time.

programme.title: Black Ransom
programme.desc: Mann, an accomplished police officer, has allowed his career to wane after his wife was murdered by the mafia. However, Mann is forced to return to his former glory when he is assigned to investigate a former police inspector suspected to be kidnapping mafia bosses and demanding ransoms in exchange for their lives.

programme.title: Golden Swallow
programme.desc: A heroine finds herself in a love triangle with a swordsman and a warrior. They team up to conquer the evil forces of the martial arts world but she is unable to choose between both men even as they face a deadly duel.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan is a wealthy Kwangtung brat with a good kung fu background, he has only one ambition: to pit his wits against three shady masters of the North. The first, conman Che Tsai. The second, a professional romantic dubbed The Terrific. Terrific introduces Tou Kuan to his third rival, Thief Shih San-shou.

programme.title: Invincible Enforcer
programme.desc: A young man is at the wrong place at the wrong time. As he offends a police inspector, he is thrown into jail and even when released, the police goes after him until he has no choice but to become a real criminal. Only a kind and beautiful probation officer is on his side, but can she help him?

programme.title: Clan Feuds
programme.desc: Tie Zhong Tang, the adopted son of the Great Banner Sect leader, is hunted by the sect’s rival for the secret to its hidden treasure. To uncover the truth, he journeys to an island seeking the “Empress of the Day”, only to find her dead. There, he unexpectedly meets the sect’s founder, the “Emperor of the Night”, who reveals that he is Tie’s biological father.

programme.title: American Girl
programme.desc: 13 year-old Fen is uprooted from LA and moves to Taipei in early 2003, when her mother is diagnosed with breast cancer. She struggles to adjust to her new life with a new school and long-separated father, and drifts away from her mother. When her younger sister is misdiagnosed with SARS, they finally open up to each other during quarantine.

programme.title: Last Suspect
programme.desc: Lawyer Chen receives a mysterious call demanding her to defend a murder suspect after her daughter is kidnapped, and is told that she can only save her daughter by winning the case. As she starts investigation with the police and evidence emerges, Chen discovers the truth and reveals the mastermind. Can she rescue her daughter in time?

programme.title: Legend of the Bat
programme.desc: It is rumoured that people can buy anything they desire on the mysterious Island of Bats so long as they have money. The charismatic swordsman Chu Liu Xiang and his friend travel to the island to seek answers but realize they are not the only ones who want to unveil the mystery of this place.

programme.title: The Kung-fu Instructor
programme.desc: Wong Yang is a famous martial artist who is forced to teach kung fu to the Mong Clan, an evil clan which is trying to destroy its nemesis, the Chow Clan. Chow Ping from the Chow Clan is a student of Wong’s caught in the Mong’s territory and as punishment, the Mong Clan wants to cut off Chow Ping’s limbs. Wong steps in to defend his student.

programme.title: The Assassin
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Nieh Cheng has retired into hiding. However, when Premier Yen's family is massacred, he seeks out the reclusive swordsman and coaxes him into a final revenge mission in this epic story set in the Six Kingdom era.

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: A mysterious new gang, the Masked Avengers, is slaughtering the martial world's greatest heroes. To stop them, three fearless fighters must track down the gang's hidden lair in Jingyang Town and put an end to their reign of terror.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: Set in 4 different eras in China, the 4-part anthology about ‘home and country’ is directed by Wu Jing, Zhang Zi Yi, Xu Zheng and Shen Teng, who also star in their own story. The movie depicts how the ‘fathers’ forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the ‘fighting’ spirit through generations.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: To Kill a Jaguar
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a village girl journeys to the big city in search of her father and meets her childhood friend Jaguar, who works for the mob boss Kam. In a world controlled by the mobs, it is a test of survival for all as Jaguar allies himself with ace gunman Ko Tang, to take over Kam’s empire.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Five Superfighters
programme.desc: A kung fu master and his three students lost everything after they are floored by a bully. To take revenge, the students find ways to learn from other kung fu masters and come back six months later to have a rematch with the bully on their master’s birthday.

programme.title: Invincible Shaolin
programme.desc: An evil Qing general comes up with a plan to rid the Shaolin masters once and for all. He invites three Northern Shaolin experts to fight against three Southern Shaolin disciples. After the contest, the general secretly kills the Southerners and places the blame on the Northerners. This leads to in-fighting between both Shaolin schools.

programme.title: Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung
programme.desc: The Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung is a group of anti-Ching martial artists who have killed a Ching official. Years later, when five disciples and descendants of Ten Tigers meet one night, one of them is killed by the son of the late Ching official who returns with a vengeance. They must fight against him to protect the Ten Tigers clan…

programme.title: Good Autumn, Mommy
programme.desc: In Lingnan, villager Chen Feng Di’s world shatters when her newborn daughter vanishes during a violent storm. Defying her husband’s resignation and the suffocating silence of village taboos, she embarks on an obsessive search. Her journey becomes a fierce awakening of maternal love and self-reclamation.

programme.title: Kung Fu Jungle
programme.desc: A vicious killer goes around challenging and killing top martial arts masters. When convicted killer and kung fu expert Ha Hou Mo hears of this, he offers to help the police capture the killer in exchange for his freedom. Can he really help?

programme.title: Godfather of Canton
programme.desc: A docker, Lin Si Hai, accidentally saves Commissioner Cheng who then offers him a position in the police force. Lin is smart and soon rises through the ranks through treachery and corruption, before becoming a gangster.

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima works for a corrupt lord Qin who is suffering from a deadly disease that only a special herb can cure. Qin sends him on an urgent mission to retrieve it, but the task is made more difficult when Sima has to fight off other martial artists who want to steal the cure away from him. He has to fight with his ultimate weapon, the Dragon Missile!

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Feng, a homeless man, is wrongly accused of robbery and subsequently arrested and imprisoned. The actual bandit bribes fellow inmate Yang, a pickpocket, to kill Feng. Aware of Feng's innocence, Yang resolves to help him escape from prison. However, their escape attempt goes awry, and both find themselves facing the grim reality of death row.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Carefree drifters Meng Gang and Tie Hu discover their purpose after meeting the revolutionary leader, Wan Tai. With the help of Meng Gang’s girlfriend, they infiltrate a warlord camp to seize weapons for the revolutionary cause. Following a fierce battle, all three make the ultimate sacrifice, becoming the "Anonymous Heroes" of the revolution.

programme.title: Imprisoned 2: There Is No Escape From Fate
programme.desc: Hong Kong businessman Yu and his secretary travel abroad for business meetings. When the secretary is killed in their hotel, Yu is arrested. Despite pleading not guilty, Yu is imprisoned in a cruel multinational prison where the warden enjoys torturing prisoners, and he must find a way to escape from this dark and deadly prison to survive.

programme.title: Lost Love
programme.desc: Mei tries to get over the death of her young son by becoming a foster parent. For 13 years, Mei’s dedication to the foster child leads her to neglect her husband and the true needs of the child. It is only through the child’s unintentional help that the couple finally manages to salvage their relationship.

programme.title: Secret Service of the Imperial Court
programme.desc: Zhao Bu Fan is the sergeant of the government’s secret police. Wang is a cruel and ruthless eunuch who takes over the Emperor’s ruling power and leads the team of secret agents. After witnessing the atrocities committed by Eunuch Wang, Sergeant Zhao decides to defect but ends up being hunted by his friends, comrades and even his father.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Wu Song is appointed as chief constable after killing a tiger with his bare hands when drunk. The wife of his brother Wu Da Lang, seduces Wu Song but gets rejected by him, and engages in an affair with a rich man. They poison Wu Da Lang when he finds out about their affair. To avenge his brother’s death, Wu Song kills both of them.

programme.title: Opium And The Kung-Fu Master
programme.desc: Tie Qiao San, head of the Ten Guangdong Tigers, is an honourable master with many disciples. As opium becomes popular among the nobles, Tie starts taking it and gradually harms his body. When an opium house’s owner defeats Tie in a fight and he is only saved from being killed by his disciple, Tie vows to quit opium and get back on his feet.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Shaolin Rescuers
programme.desc: Hong Xi Guan of Shaolin is chased and wounded by a martial arts scum who took refuge in the Qing court. He is saved and healed by friends from the wet market and they hide Hong in a bean curd shop to protect him. However, Hong’s enemy finds him and ambushes him at the shop, hoping to capture Hong and all his friends.

programme.title: Cliff Walkers
programme.desc: The first spy thriller movie by famous Director Zhang Yi Mou, this film follows four Communist Party special agents who embark on a secret operation in the Japanese puppet state of Manchukuo in 1932. Sold out by a traitor, the agents, who split up into two teams, find themselves surrounded by threats on all sides. Can they complete their mission?

programme.title: We are Family
programme.desc: Struggling as an extra, Chi Kwong joins a rent-a-family company run by Carlos and aspiring actress Catherine, and rent themselves out as make-believe relatives. As they surrogate different families, they unravel the complexities of family relationships, forging deeper connections along the way.

programme.title: Five Shaolin Masters
programme.desc: The Qing court plots to kill all Shaolin disciples by burning down Shaolin Temple. This sudden fire killed almost everyone except for five disciples. To take revenge on the Qing court, the five of them train hard in different fighting styles to become “The Five Shaolin Masters”.

programme.title: Judgement of an Assassin
programme.desc: An evil clan plans a discord so as to dominate the martial arts world. Their masked assassins massacre another clan and one of the assassins is arrested and brought to trial at a tribunal of all the clans. What judgement will they make and can they uncover the truth?

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: One of Shaw Studio’s highest grossing movies ever, this is the story of Li Chin Huan, the renowned, charming and sentimental swordsman who must fight many opponents, including an evil Clan Chief, for a place in the martial arts world.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager Cixi believes the Boxers’ claim that they have developed a kung fu that makes them impervious to weapons, thus declaring war against the alliances of eight foreign nations. The lack of weapons and good leadership in the Ching government allows the Eight Nation Alliances to take down Beijing.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: All About The Beans
programme.desc: A 100-year-old cafe born out of the friendship between Brazil and Japan. Coffee there is so great that it was even loved by superstar John Lennon.

programme.title: Nun's Cookbook
programme.desc: The temple chefs ask their neighbor from the foot of the mountain to teach them how to make a special dish using homegrown goya.

programme.title: Journeys In Japan
programme.desc: Do Minh Khai travels into the heart of pearls, Ise-Shima, where they were first cultivated. She experiences harvesting, sees pearl art, and even tastes a new pearl product.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan 15Min.
programme.desc: A series showcasing the stunning landscapes featured in Cycle Around Japan. This time: the rural surroundings of historic Kyoto, water transportation, and a nighttime ride through bustling Osaka.

programme.title: Dining With The Chef
programme.desc: Join Harry Sugiyama and Chef Kuwakino for a showcase of Niigata's natural bounty. Simple techniques bring out the fresh flavors of sansai-Japan's wild mountain vegetables.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Document 72 Hours
programme.desc: Newsstands have all but disappeared from the area around Shibuya Station in Tokyo. Yet, one still operates, even as sales keep falling. For three days, we asked customers what they bought, and why.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: A large-scale study in Japan has shown that improving one's diet and lifestyle can slow the progression of chronic kidney disease. Clinical trials in regenerative medicine are also underway.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from July 20, Day 9 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Nagoya.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Journeys In Japan
programme.desc: Do Minh Khai travels into the heart of pearls, Ise-Shima, where they were first cultivated. She experiences harvesting, sees pearl art, and even tastes a new pearl product.

programme.title: Newsline Asia 24

programme.desc: Dig deeper into current affairs. Cutting-edge information and critical analysis on important issues confronting Japanese lives.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from July 23, Day 12 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Nagoya.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.desc: Young people, born into Kyoto-pottery families, aimed to radically rethink traditional ceramics and founded Sodeisha in 1948. The group's influence spread locally and abroad and continues to this day.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Ishikawa Mao is an award-winning photographer who has been documenting the lives of people in Okinawa for 50 years. She talks about what she wants to express through her work.

programme.title: Trails To Oishii Tokyo 10Min.
programme.desc: Kiriboshi daikon-daikon radish that's cut and sun-dried to preserve it. Both tasty and nutritious, it's gaining traction as a health food. Discover more about its unique texture and versatility.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: A Secret Date
programme.desc: It's late at night, when all are fast asleep. A young man and woman huddle together along the veranda outside of a house, attending to a ... rooster. What could the pair be up to?

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: With colorful pile fabric and comfortable knits, Wakayama prefecture is drawing global attention as a textile hub. We bring you striking images of its machines and the beat of its factories.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Summer #5
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: On The Wings 5Min.
programme.desc: Join us on a night flight to admire Japan's stunning views on a journey from Tokyo to Fukuoka. Behold the sublime beauty of Mt. Fuji at sunset and the sparkling night views of major cities.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Deep dives into cultural phenomena with Peter Barakan, a bilingual British broadcaster based in Japan since 1974. Each time, Peter himself discovers something new about Japan.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Japan Railway Journal
programme.desc: A unique project along Tokyo's JR Ome Line is turning the area's empty homes into hotel rooms with one station currently acting as the front desk. See how tourism is revitalizing the community.

programme.title: Smallville S2 11
programme.desc: Whitney Fordman (former series star ERIC JOHNSON) returns home from a tour of duty with the Marines, hoping to renew his relationship with Lana.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 13
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke are having dinner in a hot tub… yup, it's exactly what you think. And it's a blast from the past as Kevin re-hacks a self-tanner. Plus, in the new Saved by the Hacks, our teens have let the hacks take over.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 14
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin learn ways to game the system with parking, and the Lazy Cook returns with a recipe for bringing old mac and cheese back to life. Plus, Senora is not the portrait of good behavior in a new Hacks Del Corazon.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 11
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 12
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 8
programme.desc: Don't touch that remote, it's time for 20 of the World's Dumbest TV Shows... from Brazilian cross dressers and out-of-control bounty hunters, to a reverend who curses up a storm, insane mixed martial arts, and the cheesiest superhero ever to pretendto fly. With hilarious commentary from comedians like Jared Logan, Judy Gold, and Chris Fairbanks.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 2
programme.desc: Arch-enemies drop their guard to team up against a new threat. Then, it's back to the future when Desert Dan risks all on a tire and a hunch. And later, blades are drawn, fragile alliances crumble, and the buyers let nothing stand in the way of winning big.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S8 2
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q get ballsy while posing as salesmen, and then try to outdo each other as they invade the personal space of confused strangers. And tonight's loser is up against the ropes, playing dress-up for an unruly arena.

programme.desc: When Leonard gets minor surgery on his nose, Sheldon has a major overreaction. Meanwhile Howard and Bernadette work on their marriage in light of Raj's parents' impending divorce.

programme.desc: Monica falls asleep during sex. Rachel argues with Tag. Ross and Joey get stranded on the roof.

programme.title: Friends S7 13
programme.desc: Phoebe becomes involved with a suicidal office worker.Rachel breaks Joey's favorite chair.Monica's beloved childhood belongings are destroyed.

programme.title: Titans S1 6
programme.desc: Dick reluctantly teams with the new Robin, Jason Todd.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: A group of interconnected Baltimore-based twenty and thirtysomethings navigate their various relationships from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep murky waters of married life trying to read the signs of the opposite sex - and hoping to be the exceptions to the no-exceptions rule. Gigi just wants a man who says he'll call - and does - while Alex advises her to stop sitting by the phone. Beth wonders if she should call it off after years of committed singlehood with her boyfriend Neil but he doesn't think there's a single thing wrong with their unmarried life. Janine's not sure if she can trust her husband Ben who can't quite trust himself around Anna. Anna can't decide between the sexy married guy or her straightforward no-sparks standby Conor who can't get over the fact that he can't have her. And Mary who's found an entire network of loving supportive men just needs to find one who's straight.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Henry Fonda stars in director Alfred Hitchcock's real-life thriller of an innocent man trapped as the victim of a heartless criminal justice system--even though he's The Wrong Man. When an eyewitness to a robbery identifies musician Christopher Balestrero (Fonda) as the culprit, Balestrero cannot prove where he was on the day of the crime. Now, the wheels of justice--driven by the testimony of witnesses--mercilessly grind away the life of a man who looks remarkably like the real thief. Based on the novel The True Story of Christopher Emmanuel Balestrero by Maxwell Anderson.

programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 14
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the "call of nature." Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.desc: Ross treats a baby for an overdose; Carter makes a surgical error; Hathaway hauls in a stroke victim; Boulet gives Benton a decision.

programme.desc: After discovering that Lionel has secretly installed video cameras in the mansion, Lex hires thugs to put surveillance devices in Lionel's Metropolis office.

programme.desc: Brooke meets a dominatrix who wants to teach a pomegranate a lesson, and Mack and Jack try to help a new couple beat the cohabitation curse. Plus, Kevin and Brooke test a hack that puts your baby to work.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 16
programme.desc: Have Kevin and Brooke finally found the hacked pool of their dreams in "Hack or Wack"? And in "Hack Line of Defense," rude teenagers will no longer spoil the mood, thanks to hacks that will keep them on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 1
programme.desc: Your TV screen is ablaze with dumbness! TruTV is counting down the 20 most laughable hotshots ever caught on tape. Watch a guy pass out on an amusement park ride, a wild spring break fight, and the weirdest use of a Roman candle in the history of fireworks. Our hilarious cast of hotshot comedians, including Brendon Walsh, Kevin McCaffrey, Rachel Feinstein, and Chris Fairbanks have plenty to say about it all.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 3
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don't strike it rich if you play it safe, so he gambles big on a risky bin. Then, Lori defies her husband Brandon and buys a questionable unit. Will her bold move lead to a dynasty or divorce? And later, lightning erupts when the buyers battle it out for a puzzle of parts they hope will add up to one smooth ride.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S8 3
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. And tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 3

programme.title: Into the Storm
programme.desc: In the span of a single day, the town of Silverton is ravaged by an unprecedented onslaught of tornadoes. The entire town is at the mercy of the erratic and deadly cyclones, even as storm trackers predict the worst is yet to come. Most people seek shelter, while others run towards the vortex, testing how far a storm chaser will go for that once-in-a-lifetime shot. Told through the eyes and lenses of professional storm chasers, thrill-seeking amateurs, and courageous townspeople, "Into the Storm" throws you directly into the eye of the storm to experience Mother Nature at her most extreme.

programme.title: North By Northwest
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars as an innocent man mistaken for a spy in one of director Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers. While leaving New York's Plaza Hotel, advertising executive Roger Thornhill (Grant) has the misfortune of standing just as the name "George Kaplan" is paged--starting a lethal case of mistaken identity and a nonstop game of cat and mouse as he is pursued across North America by espionage agents trying to kill him--and by police who suspect him of murder.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 1
programme.desc: Your TV screen is ablaze with dumbness! TruTV is counting down the 20 most laughable hotshots ever caught on tape. programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: When a lieutenant's water-logged body is discovered with a potential connection to an international smuggling ring, NIS Panama agents are called in to assist, and Gibbs comes face-to-face with an old nemesis: Special Agent Dwayne Pride.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 1)
programme.desc: After one of New York’s most sought-after plastic surgeons is found dead, Elsbeth has her eye on the victim’s former boss, Dr. Vanessa Holmes, who she believes has motives that are more than skin-deep.

programme.title: Long Bright River (Season 1)
programme.desc: An unlikely ambush leaves Mickey reeling and pauses Mickey’s hunt for Kacey. Mickey and Truman’s bond deepens as they spend holiday time together with Thomas. A Christmas revelation helps Mickey get closer to the truth about Kacey but drives a wedge between her and Gee.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)
programme.desc: The team is drawn into the mystical world of fortune telling when a tarot card is found near a drowned U.S. Naval officer depicting the exact manner of his death.

programme.title: Cyril: Simply Magic
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: Teams travel more than 2,000 miles from Vietnam to India where they must balance traditional pots on their heads while performing a folk dance, and assemble a life-size, three-dimensional mural.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: Lieutenant Grey and the FBI task force enlist the help of an old colleague to uncover a criminal network; while Nolan, Miles, Lucy and Celina respond to a mysterious officer involved shooting.

programme.desc: As Mickey confronts the consequences of naming Paula, she reconnects with her family. A new development in the Jimmy Scanlon disappearance leads Mickey and Truman to surprising but familiar places.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 7)
programme.desc: After a man is stabbed by an intruder who left no trace of a break-in, Rex’s senses reveal it was only a practice run for a scheme that goes much deeper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: For the first time in The Amazing Race history, the votes for the mandatory U-turn are in, and one team must complete both detours in India, bundling up flowers and transporting building materials on rickshaws in the bustling streets of Jaipur.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: It’s Valentine’s Day, and the team is on the hunt for someone who is setting more than hearts on fire. Meanwhile, Celina thinks Miles’ recent string of bad luck is the result of a curse, and she’s determined to break it.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: When the NIS Regional Director tries to transfer Mary Jo, she reconnects with an old friend from Atlantic City to help investigate the roadside deaths of two Marines.

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: When an undercover operation led by Special Agent Nina Chase goes sideways, the team works together to flip their only witness to help them hunt down a rip crew at a cartel wedding.

programme.desc: While training with Long Beach SWAT, Street discovers a biker club has stolen a cache of armor-piercing bullets and brings 20-Squad into the hunt for the gang before they can pull off a daring and deadly heist.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Melissa Mackay brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: Australian Story
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Back Roads
programme.desc: Lisa Millar explores Australia's very own Jurassic Park. Mission Beach is a tropical paradise in Queensland where two World Heritage natural wonders meet, and home to the modern-day dinosaur, the Southern Cassowary.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Moments
programme.desc: Australia's oceans and waterways are home to some of the planet's largest and most intimidating creatures and living alongside them is a delicate art.

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Looking for some easy peasy recipes? Look no further than The Cook Up kitchen tonight, where Adam, host Osher Gunsberg and chef Tom Walton will be aiming to please with their peas.

programme.title: Eat The Invaders
programme.desc: Tony Armstrong joins Women Against Cane Toads (WACT), a group dedicated to hand-catching toads. After bagging hundreds, there's more than enough for dinner. But aren't they poisonous?

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Lorna Dunkley.

programme.title: Play On
programme.desc: This episode looks at Fijian rugby in Melbourne, meeting a team of PALM Scheme workers, who have saved a club from collapse and are making a charge at the Grand Final. Plus we examine the ancient sport of Dragonboat.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Escaping an abusive past, Jennifer moves into Apartment 212 for a fresh start, only to wake each day with painful bite marks. She soon discovers an ancient parasite that feeds on human flesh lurking within the walls. As attacks intensify, she must confront a nightmare more terrifying than her past before it consumes her.

programme.title: The Revenge

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Tear Us Apart
programme.desc: After their young daughter’s mysterious disappearance, Drew and Helen retreat to a secluded woodland cottage for therapy. As they struggle to salvage their marriage, isolation fractures their sanity. Haunted by visions and strange events, Helen can no longer tell what is real as her mind unravels.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Jennifer joins a tour to explore the renowned windmills of the Netherlands. As their tour coach breaks down on the way, they seek refuge in a creepy shed near a sinister windmill with a dark history. When some tour members suddenly disappear, Jennifer discovers a shared secret among them, linking their fates in a chilling revelation.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When the body of free-spirited Bonnie Ruphard, 47, is spotted by a runner in Lafayette, LA, police suspect domestic violence.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: Bad decisions cause people to get booked in, including a first-timer that resisted arrest for riding their bicycle on the wrong side of the road, a couple that had half a pound of meth.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A shooting suspect begins cutting himself with a pocket knife after investigators leave him alone in the interrogation room; a woman breaks down after telling police that she drowned her grandmother.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A man breaks down sobbing after admitting to stabbing his mom; an actress tells detectives how and why she shot her estranged uncle; a suspected murderer tries to broker an immunity deal; and more.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Andy has worked odd jobs his entire adult life, and he considers himself an entrepreneur specialising in the reselling of scrap and junk.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: When a respected Cleveland doctor goes missing, a chilling investigation into his fractured family explodes into a 12-hour standoff and a brutal truth that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a witness sees a nightclub owner jump to his death from his fifth-floor condo, the case is seemingly open and shut; that is until Dr. Jennifer Nara's autopsy reveals shocking new evidence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him—even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour—a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods, and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.desc: A man in Modesto was apprehended by a K9 unit while fleeing from police; another was arrested while his family dog was bleeding in their backyard.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An accused sex offender masturbates in virtual court; a defendant begs the judge to let him go home to take care of his dog; a convicted murderer tells the judge to 'hurry up' during sentencing; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A father attacks his son's killer in court; a defendant drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a man convicted of child abuse lashes out at the judge; and more.

programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.desc: After a man is shot dead, pathologist Dr. Antoine Wrice works with investigators to interpret unusual evidence found on the scene and unwind the complex case that could be more than a typical homicide.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a mother of three is found lying unconscious beneath her open, second-story window, Medical Examiner Dr. Dragovic suspects there is more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2)

programme.desc: India's begging syndicates place beggars on the street then collect their earnings. The money is enough to keep the operation running through violence and intimidation.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: C Dans L'Air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: La Belle Vie
programme.desc: Julien sets off to visit Jean-Luc Kanape living in the land of his ancestors, where he has built a small off-grid cabin. Guardian of this territory of the caribou, he shares with Julien his love of the forest and of handing down the ancestral knowledge of the Innu.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: In Seine-Maritime, David Gallienne explores asparagus farming. With chef Melanie, they prepare a green asparagus and hazelnut tartare, topped with a white asparagus veloute and a poached egg.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: Along with event curator Alexandre Samson, we look back at the ''1997 Fashion Big Bang'' exhibition at Paris's Musee Galliera. Discover the history of the lucky ladybird. Spotlight on candlemaking: the former royal manufactory, the house of Trudon celebrates its 380th anniversary. How should you wear a cape?

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: In Seine-Maritime, David Gallienne explores asparagus farming. With chef Melanie, they prepare a green asparagus and hazelnut tartare, topped with a white asparagus veloute and a poached egg.

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: Today, Garance is in Bienne, a bilingual town close to the German-speaking part of Switzerland. Who will have a chance to win 1,000 francs?

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: La Belle Vie

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: Since the early 1990s, XULY.Bet has designed clothes that combine comfort and style with a commitment to sustainability. The fashion designer Lamine Badian Kouyate describes his work as he presents his spring-summer 2024 runway show.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Pour Le Maillot Jaune...
programme.desc: The romantic relationship between a sports journalist and a cyclist during the 1939 Tour de France.

programme.title: La Premiere Marche
programme.desc: When Victoire, a young trans judoka, reaches the final of a regional competition, her opponent, Sonia, refuses to compete against her.

programme.title: Temps De Chien
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.title: OPJ
programme.desc: Founder of an association helping troubled youth, Adele Meyer appears to be a generous and sincere woman. Yet she becomes the target of several assassination attempts. Commander Clarissa Hoarau is assigned to the case.

programme.title: OPJ
programme.desc: During her investigation, Commander Clarissa Hoarau makes strange discoveries. Adele Meyer's husband hides a delinquent past, and their neighbor turns out to be Captain Nico Storelli, the brigade's newest recruit.

programme.title: Le Village Des Endormis
programme.desc: As a murderer, Lucas, manages to escape during a prison transfer, a strange phenomenon turns life upside down in a village: one after another the locals fall into a long sleep. Martin, police captain on the verge of divorce, has to find Lucas amidst an overwhelming climate of collective panic.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs
programme.desc: Sam and Mario head to Lake Ontario to try to discover the identity of an unnamed wreck that could well be the remains of a British warship dating from the war of 1812.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: In Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Jerome Valton, a visual artist and screen printer who draws inspiration from pedological patterns and cartography. programme.title: Le Grand Cactus
programme.desc: Contents: Donald Trump, Elon Musk and Brigitte Macron; an investigation into the world of bailiffs; doctor in mathematics, physicist, professor at ULB, author of scientific riddles, social media darling, Fabrizio Bucella is the special guest.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: A journalist, author and podcaster, Nawal was born in Tunis. Of Amazigh origin, she was raised by a Franco-Algerian couple in the Paris region. Drawing on her lived experience and investigations, she deconstructs negrophobia and unspoken racial issues within North African diasporas, notably in her podcast ''Is That a Thing Among Us?''

programme.title: Le Duplex
programme.desc: On the sixth floor of a Paris apartment block, the Berger family are dreaming of converting their flat into a duplex by buying the neighbours' flat below. Except that these neighbours are very happy in their home. The only solution: sow discord to force them to sell. But sometimes you are hoisted with your own petard.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles
programme.desc: The North Atlantic right whale, an endangered species with fewer than 360 individuals, is threatened by crab fishing ropes. Scientists and fishers are working together to balance wildlife protection and economic activity.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: A journalist, author and podcaster, Nawal was born in Tunis. Of Amazigh origin, she was raised by a Franco-Algerian couple in the Paris region. Drawing on her lived experience and investigations, she deconstructs negrophobia and unspoken racial issues within North African diasporas, notably in her podcast ''Is That a Thing Among Us?''

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: Garance is at the Franches-Montagnes carnival. A great atmosphere is guaranteed, but will there be any candidates willing to try their luck to win 1,000 francs?

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles
programme.desc: The North Atlantic right whale, an endangered species with fewer than 360 individuals, is threatened by crab fishing ropes. Scientists and fishers are working together to balance wildlife protection and economic activity.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: ''For souls nobly born valour doesn't await the passing of years!'', so said Rodrigo in ''El Cid''. And you could say the same of Fathi and Halim, the young 15 year-old designers who created the brand Hype, with support and help from Les Ateliers Lina Khei.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Les Heros Du Patrimoine
programme.desc: Heritage is at the heart of an annual celebration: the European Heritage Days. Adrien Gavazzi heads to the Dordogne, department of a thousand and one castles. Here he meets some of those opening the doors to a normally private world, an invitation to discover an emblematic spot or little-known gem.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Cleo, Melvil Et Moi
programme.desc: March 2020, in Saint-Germain-des-Pres. In the context of the first lockdown, Arnaud, a fifty-something screenwriter and separated father, takes advantage of this pause to reconnect with his children, begin a love story, and remember...

programme.title: Rentrons
programme.desc: In a village in northern Algeria, Nouria and Abdel, a Frenchman who lives and works there, are friends. Following a bet, they set off on a moped trip along the Mediterranean coast. Their goal: to board a boat that will take them back to France.

programme.title: La Copie De Coralie
programme.desc: Manager of a reprographics shop, Mr. Conforme is haunted by the memory of a woman. Witnessing the distress of the employer, Virginie, the assistant, posts a search notice on the walls of the city.

programme.title: L'Oeil Du Cyclone
programme.desc: Despite Jade leaving for the Gaspe Peninsula, Isabelle's mental load isn't any lighter. She has to cope with Jules' existential questions.

programme.title: L'Oeil Du Cyclone
programme.desc: With Jean-Francois feeling guilty about his infidelity, Mylene suggests that they have an open relationship. Meanwhile Isabelle decides to put her romantic life in the hands of a professional matchmaker.

programme.title: L'Oeil Du Cyclone
programme.desc: Jade has returned home for a long weekend and reveals a side of her personality that even Isabelle had never suspected.

programme.title: L'Oeil Du Cyclone
programme.desc: eliane and Isabelle need to have some renovation work done. And just happen to meet a really rather sexy plumber.

programme.title: La Faune Connectee
programme.desc: Each winter, Northern map turtles hibernate under the ice on Opinicon Lake, with no access to air. In the face of climate warming and sound pollution, they have become essential allies for biologists, helped by recent technologies to study how they adapt.

programme.title: Le Voyage De Fanny
programme.desc: At the height of the Second World War, 12-year old Fanny looks after her younger sisters in a home, far from their parents. Forced to flee suddenly, she finds herself leading a group of eight children on a dangerous journey across occupied France to reach the Swiss border.

programme.title: Ativio - Les Morceaux De Bois
programme.desc: Guenole, aged 12, lives in an isolated Togolese village. Gifted in music, he dreams of playing the piano but doesn't own one.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Skate Le Monde
programme.desc: Mathieu Cyr heads for Peru where the skateboarding scene has taken off considerably over the last decade. There, he discovers a country combining traditions with modernity and a community with a strong spirit of cooperation.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: In Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Jerome Valton, a visual artist and screen printer who draws inspiration from pedological patterns and cartography.
